message:
fix: downgrade handler-level slog.Error to slog.Warn for recoverable errors (#7761)

HTTP handler errors (503 service unavailable, 500 internal error, bad
gateway, cluster fetch failures) are recoverable — the server returns an
error response but continues running. These should be slog.Warn, not
slog.Error. slog.Error is reserved for panics and unrecoverable failures.

Changes across 4 files:
- console_persistence.go: 34 handler errors → slog.Warn
- gitops.go: 25 cluster/helm/ArgoCD errors → slog.Warn
- nightly_e2e.go: 5 upstream errors → slog.Warn
- rbac.go: 5 K8s API errors → slog.Warn

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
